creator: lumiwa@gmail.com
text:
Hi!

kldload acpi_ibm give me a message:
driver bug: Unable to set devclass (class: ppc devname:(unknown))

Also during boot I got;
acpi_ec0: no response to 0x 84
acpi_ec0: GPE query filed: AE-NO-HARDWARE RESPONSE

Thank you.

I have FreeBSD 13.0-RELEASE installed on Thinkpad T495.
